notes: This ledger is the mechanical owner-search phasing gate for the ZestStream holding-company goal.
Candidates with sequence 1 or 2 must trace to warm network, referral, client talk, community, or field-trip sourcing before search_status can be allowed or signed_owner.
Public open-call and inbound public sourcing are allowed only from sequence 3 onward.
